converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell University Office of Controller records
Cornell University. Office of Controller
7-1-1883
6.4 cubic feet. 6.4 cubic feet.
1911-1982. Bonds, contracts, correspondence, blueprints, vouchers, meeting minutes. Budget figures, reports, payroll vouchers, and other records of the Controller of Cornell University. Collection material in English 2073520
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
J. Solomon
Date completed:
April 1981
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, August 2003
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes bid bonds from various building companies for heating, ventilation, and electrical wiring, bonds to accompany proposals for building work, contract bonds, contracts for University buildings, specifications for labor and materials required for construction, articles of agreement between the University and construction companies or private individuals for construction work or materials, certification of dollars paid out or rebated by architectural firms or construction companies. Also contains a blueprint of Olin Hall, correspondence (with several letters pertaining to the building of Willard Straight Hall and signed by Dorothy Whitney Straight and the Comptroller of the University Charles D. Bostwick, 1924), meeting notes for the Cornell Plantations Committee Meeting (1947-1970), pictures (several of Clara Dickson Hall), and state leases held by the Treasurer's Office. Also budget figures, reports, payroll vouchers, and other records of the Controller of Cornell University.
Cite As:
Cornell University Office of Controller records, #7-1-1883. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 7 restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
Universities and colleges -- Finance. Cornell University -- : Accounting. Cornell University -- : Finance.
